source_scope.description: Unified export of S4L material assignments and partial tissue model inventory.

notes: Composite CNS snapshot covering brain and spinal cord.
This file likely spans multiple material regions rather than a single homogeneous tissue.
Models under S4L/tissue are incomplete and can be assembled into a larger human model later.
